### Maintenance

releases.description:
## What's Changed

### Fixes
- await promises ([44de86f](https://github.com/mikedidomizio/obsidian-divide-and-conquer/commit/44de86f53f584d23e86c5bf7afb4274a0610c595)) by [@mikedidomizio](https://github.com/mikedidomizio) in [#17](https://github.com/mikedidomizio/obsidian-divide-and-conquer/pull/17)

### Refactors
- void returned instead of Promise<void> ([e039188](https://github.com/mikedidomizio/obsidian-divide-and-conquer/commit/e039188d3b54afd3c0eaedcd83793eec0d9e1d09)) by [@mikedidomizio](https://github.com/mikedidomizio) in [#17](https://github.com/mikedidomizio/obsidian-divide-and-conquer/pull/17)
- use setAttr instead of setDisabled ([6392a15](https://github.com/mikedidomizio/obsidian-divide-and-conquer/commit/6392a155e9a8d0c48e2dac466ff1ef70d3d693af)) by [@mikedidomizio](https://github.com/mikedidomizio) in [#17](https://github.com/mikedidomizio/obsidian-divide-and-conquer/pull/17)
- use class selectors over inline styles ([0ab0195](https://github.com/mikedidomizio/obsidian-divide-and-conquer/commit/0ab019533ecf103171e7537cc7a1a8da0e8fee7f)) by [@mikedidomizio](https://github.com/mikedidomizio) in [#17](https://github.com/mikedidomizio/obsidian-divide-and-conquer/pull/17)
- use typedef over type assertion ([b4f0984](https://github.com/mikedidomizio/obsidian-divide-and-conquer/commit/b4f098442d8418fc9fd5729a457f15786228a36a)) by [@mikedidomizio](https://github.com/mikedidomizio) in [#17](https://github.com/mikedidomizio/obsidian-divide-and-conquer/pull/17)
- use template literal ([2e0fd7c](https://github.com/mikedidomizio/obsidian-divide-and-conquer/commit/2e0fd7c9c6e49f8b9cf098a02f68d69693dad3b4)) by [@mikedidomizio](https://github.com/mikedidomizio) in [#17](https://github.com/mikedidomizio/obsidian-divide-and-conquer/pull/17)
- function returns void ([e93c8f6](https://github.com/mikedidomizio/obsidian-divide-and-conquer/commit/e93c8f689d73e8ba7218a88f7dcb3a144ac72523)) by [@mikedidomizio](https://github.com/mikedidomizio) in [#17](https://github.com/mikedidomizio/obsidian-divide-and-conquer/pull/17)
- use classes over direct styling ([d95325e](https://github.com/mikedidomizio/obsidian-divide-and-conquer/commit/d95325ebfae4681a9a39e1389b96f7043a7ff637)) by [@mikedidomizio](https://github.com/mikedidomizio) in [#17](https://github.com/mikedidomizio/obsidian-divide-and-conquer/pull/17)
- convert heading to use Setting class ([3ffaa4c](https://github.com/mikedidomizio/obsidian-divide-and-conquer/commit/3ffaa4c166a2ba5a97be2c5d77761ad61700e2c1)) by [@mikedidomizio](https://github.com/mikedidomizio) in [#17](https://github.com/mikedidomizio/obsidian-divide-and-conquer/pull/17)
- use Setting to build warning ([11b3f67](https://github.com/mikedidomizio/obsidian-divide-and-conquer/commit/11b3f67d42f3b2db474d0973492cf3e915ee7b06)) by [@mikedidomizio](https://github.com/mikedidomizio) in [#17](https://github.com/mikedidomizio/obsidian-divide-and-conquer/pull/17)
- use window.setTimeout for popout compatibility ([e260c80](https://github.com/mikedidomizio/obsidian-divide-and-conquer/commit/e260c809c595d1e74c01f035b19604689d35fd45)) by [@mikedidomizio](https://github.com/mikedidomizio) in [#17](https://github.com/mikedidomizio/obsidian-divide-and-conquer/pull/17)
- fix for import, bound function ([dc1ceea](https://github.com/mikedidomizio/obsidian-divide-and-conquer/commit/dc1ceeac2ef48c1357210032d755422d44462d80)) by [@mikedidomizio](https://github.com/mikedidomizio) in [#17](https://github.com/mikedidomizio/obsidian-divide-and-conquer/pull/17)

### Tests

releases.description:
## What's Changed
* test: adds testing support with tests that try to resemble user interactions by @mikedidomizio in https://github.com/mikedidomizio/obsidian-divide-and-conquer/pull/1
* fix: level reset after reload by @mikedidomizio in https://github.com/mikedidomizio/obsidian-divide-and-conquer/pull/2
* build: add ESLint by @mikedidomizio in https://github.com/mikedidomizio/obsidian-divide-and-conquer/pull/3
* break: change UX by replacing buttons and steps by @mikedidomizio in https://github.com/mikedidomizio/obsidian-divide-and-conquer/pull/4

## New Contributors
* @mikedidomizio made their first contribution in https://github.com/mikedidomizio/obsidian-divide-and-conquer/pull/1

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mikedidomizio/obsidian-divide-and-conquer/compare/1.0.2...2.0.0
